taskId: 20260707-140250-优化项目空间命名与空间信息展示
message:
## Handoff

### Artifacts produced
Planning only; no production code changed.

Updated:
- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-140250-优化项目空间命名与空间信息展示/brief.md`
- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-140250-优化项目空间命名与空间信息展示/prd.md`
- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-140250-优化项目空间命名与空间信息展示/ui.md`
- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-140250-优化项目空间命名与空间信息展示/design.md`
- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-140250-优化项目空间命名与空间信息展示/implement.md`
- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-140250-优化项目空间命名与空间信息展示/checks.md`
- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-140250-优化项目空间命名与空间信息展示/handoff.md`

### Key design conclusions
- `Main` comes from `components/SessionSidebar.tsx` `displaySpaceName()` fallback; minimal fix: change main-space fallback to `主空间`, without changing `spaceId: "main"`.
- Top-left/sidebar space info should be formatted in `SessionSidebar.tsx`:
  - Main/normal Git: `空间：主空间 · 分支：<branch>`
  - No branch: `空间：主空间 · 未检测到 Git 分支`
  - WorkTree: `空间：<spaceName> · WorkTree：<branch|未知分支> · 基准：<base|未知>`
- Existing data has `branch/mainWorktreeBranch` but not creation-time `baseRef`. Recommended optional enhancement: persist `baseRef` on new WorkTree creation and preserve it on refresh.

### Main files for implementer
- `components/SessionSidebar.tsx`
- Optional data enhancement:
  - `lib/project-registry-types.ts`
  - `lib/project-registry.ts`
  - `lib/git-worktree.ts`
  - `lib/types.ts`
  - `app/api/git/worktrees/route.ts`
- Docs if fields/UI change:
  - `docs/modules/frontend.md`
  - `docs/modules/library.md`
  - `docs/modules/api.md`
  - `docs/architecture/overview.md`

### Validation run
Not run; planning/design only.

Recommended after implementation:

```bash
npm run lint
node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit
```

### Decisions needed
1. Should historical/manual `displayName: "Main"` also be forced to show `主空间`? Recommended: no migration; only change fallback.
2. Should WorkTree source/base be exact creation `baseRef`? Recommended: persist `baseRef` for newly created WorkTrees; old/external WorkTrees show `mainWorktreeBranch` or `未知`.

- `components/SessionSidebar.tsx`

- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed

- Manual hover verification in a real WorkTree dropdown still needs parent/session UI check if required.

taskId: 20260707-140250-优化项目空间命名与空间信息展示
message:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `lib/project-registry-types.ts` — added optional `worktree.baseRef`.
- `lib/git-worktree.ts` — added optional `baseRef` to Git/WorkTree metadata and WorktreeRecord; created WorkTrees now include `baseRef` in returned metadata.
- `lib/project-registry.ts` — persists `baseRef` when syncing newly created WorkTree spaces; preserves existing `baseRef` during refresh/discovery when Git cannot provide it.
- `lib/types.ts` — added optional `baseRef` to shared `GitInfo` / `WorktreeInfo`.
- `app/api/git/worktrees/route.ts` — passes `result.baseRef` into Project Registry sync after WorkTree creation.

#### Verification

- `npm run lint` — passed
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — passed

#### Notes / Risks

- No manual `/api/projects` WorkTree creation check was run; requires dev server and creating a real WorkTree.
- Docs updates are left for PS-04 per plan.
- Existing/externally discovered WorkTrees without saved `baseRef` remain compatible; refresh preserves saved `baseRef` but cannot reconstruct missing historical creation source.

message:
### Implementation Complete

#### Files Changed

- `docs/modules/frontend.md` — documented `SessionSidebar` `主空间` fallback, enriched space subtitle/detail tooltip, WorkTree badge tooltip.
- `docs/modules/library.md` — documented WorkTree metadata, optional `baseRef`, preservation behavior, shared Git/WorkTree types.
- `docs/modules/api.md` — documented `/api/projects`, `/api/git/worktrees`, `/api/git/info` baseRef/main-space behavior.
- `docs/architecture/overview.md` — documented Project Registry main-space invariant and best-effort WorkTree metadata/baseRef semantics.
- `.ypi/tasks/20260707-140250-优化项目空间命名与空间信息展示/task.json` — marked PS-04 done and PS-05 ready.

#### Verification

- `git diff -- docs/modules/frontend.md docs/modules/library.md docs/modules/api.md docs/architecture/overview.md` — reviewed docs diff.
- Not run: `npm run lint` / `tsc` (docs-only subtask).

#### Notes / Risks

- Current code stores `baseRef`, but `SessionSidebar` appears to display WorkTree base from `mainWorktreeBranch`/Git metadata rather than stored `baseRef`; checker/main session should verify if this is intended.
- No product decision needed from PS-04 beyond existing questions about historical `displayName: "Main"` behavior.
